languages.text: "Вольный Торговец, я держу энтеральный инъектор наготове. Нунциус готов ассистировать, если потребуется срочная экстракция этого... нутриента из вашего желудка".
"Rogue Trader, I have the enteral injector at the ready. Nuncius is poised to assist if there is an urgent need to extract this... nutrient from your stomach."
languages.original_text: "Вольный Торговец, я держу энтеральный инъектор наготове. Нунциус готов ассистировать, если потребуется срочная экстракция этого... нутриента из вашего желудка".

traits.locale_text: "Rogue Trader, I have the enteral injector at the ready. Nuncius is poised to assist if there is an urgent need to extract this... nutrient from your stomach."
"Rogue Trader, I have the enteral injector at the ready. Nuncius is poised to assist if there is an urgent need to extract this... nutrient from your stomach."
"Rogue Trader, I have the enteral injector at the ready. Nuncius is poised to assist if there is an urgent need to extract this... nutrient from your stomach."

languages.text: «Comerciante Independiente, tengo el inyector entérico preparado. Nuncius está en posición para ayudar si es necesario extraer el... nutriente de su estómago».
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, I have the enteral injector at the ready. Nuncius is poised to assist if there is an urgent need to extract this... nutrient from your stomach."

traits.locale_text: «Comerciante Independiente, tengo el inyector entérico preparado. Nuncius está en posición para ayudar si es necesario extraer el... nutriente de su estómago».

languages.text: “行商浪人，我已经准备好肠内注射器了。如果急需从您胃里提取这种……营养物质，努恩修斯随时可以协助。”
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, I have the enteral injector at the ready. Nuncius is poised to assist if there is an urgent need to extract this... nutrient from your stomach."

traits.locale_text: “行商浪人，我已经准备好肠内注射器了。如果急需从您胃里提取这种……营养物质，努恩修斯随时可以协助。”

languages.text: « {rt_mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, mon injecteur entéral est prêt. Nuncius est également prêt à nous aider si une extraction d'urgence de ces... nutriments est nécessaire. »
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, I have the enteral injector at the ready. Nuncius is poised to assist if there is an urgent need to extract this... nutrient from your stomach."

traits.locale_text: « {rt_mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, mon injecteur entéral est prêt. Nuncius est également prêt à nous aider si une extraction d'urgence de ces... nutriments est nécessaire. »

languages.text: "Hür Tacir, enteral enjektörüm hazır. Eğer bu... Besini midenizden acilen çıkarmak gerekirse Nuncius da yardıma hazır bekliyor."
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, I have the enteral injector at the ready. Nuncius is poised to assist if there is an urgent need to extract this... nutrient from your stomach."

traits.locale_text: "Hür Tacir, enteral enjektörüm hazır. Eğer bu... Besini midenizden acilen çıkarmak gerekirse Nuncius da yardıma hazır bekliyor."

languages.text: 「ローグトレーダー、経腸インジェクターの準備はできています。あなたの胃からこの……栄養物を緊急に抽出する必要が生じた場合に備え、ヌンキウスも援護の構えです」
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, I have the enteral injector at the ready. Nuncius is poised to assist if there is an urgent need to extract this... nutrient from your stomach."

traits.locale_text: 「ローグトレーダー、経腸インジェクターの準備はできています。あなたの胃からこの……栄養物を緊急に抽出する必要が生じた場合に備え、ヌンキウスも援護の構えです」

languages.text: "{mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, der Enteralinjektor ist bereit. Nuncius brennt darauf, zu helfen, wenn der dringende Bedarf besteht, diesen ... Nährstoff aus Eurem Magen zu extrahieren."
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, I have the enteral injector at the ready. Nuncius is poised to assist if there is an urgent need to extract this... nutrient from your stomach."

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, der Enteralinjektor ist bereit. Nuncius brennt darauf, zu helfen, wenn der dringende Bedarf besteht, diesen ... Nährstoff aus Eurem Magen zu extrahieren."
